_doc: Slot x regulation -> vocabulary target selectors for the content (predicate/object/condition) coverage pass. Each selector picks terms from terms.json: by 'scheme' (dpv/pd), by 'root' (airo/vair subClassOf root), or 'all' (whole vocab file). An empty target list means no routed vocabulary -> every value reported as a structural gap (no_target).
_exclude_doc: Abstract top-of-scheme root concepts removed from ALL match targets: matching a bare category word (purpose/data/risk/authority) to its root class is never a content hit; real mentions hit the specific subclasses. Stops 'purpose' over-promoting purpose-limitation qualifier clauses, etc.
_idf_floor_doc: Minimum IDF-summed lexical score for an OBJECT lexical hit to be auto-emitted as a mapped IRI (multi-concept objects map by rule). Hits below the floor, or objects with no lexical hit, fall to review.
